name: expo
description: Official Expo skills for building, deploying, upgrading, and debugging Expo and React Native apps.

interface.shortDescription: Build, deploy, upgrade, and debug Expo and React Native apps
interface.longDescription: Official Expo-authored skills for building Expo Router UI, authoring API routes, configuring data fetching and styling, writing Expo native modules, creating dev clients, upgrading Expo SDKs, observing apps, and deploying Expo apps with EAS workflows, builds, hosting, TestFlight, App Store, and Play Store guidance.
defaultPrompt: Upgrade this app to the latest Expo SDK
Deploy this Expo app with EAS
